app_release_notes: v0.16.55 - New: a searchable User Manual in the Support menu, a 'Libraries' page that combines Loads, Bullets, and Barrels, and a 'What's New' window so you can see what each update brings.

mac.app_release_notes: v0.16.55 - New: a searchable User Manual in the Support menu, a 'Libraries' page that combines Loads, Bullets, and Barrels, and a 'What's New' window so you can see what each update brings.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.16.54 - Clearer velocity chart: the up-and-down spread bars are now labeled 'shot-to-shot spread' so it's obvious at a glance what they show.
